assets.name: Allow Throw
assets.passive: Trust. Purchase to allow your Jawhead teammate to fling you.

assets.name: Antique Cuirass
assets.passive: Deter. When hit by a skill, reduces the attacker's Physical Damage by 6% for 2s (this effect stacks up to 3 times).

assets.name: Athena's Shield
assets.passive: Shield. Upon taking Magic Damage, gains 25% Magic Damage Reduction for 3s (applies before taking damage). Regains this effect 5s after leaving combat.

assets.name: Azure Blade
assets.passive: Judgement. Within 3s after using a skill, the next Basic Attack deals an additional 50 True Damage. Cooldown: 1.5s.

assets.name: Berserker's Fury
assets.passive: Doom. Critical strikes grant 5% extra Physical Attack for 2s.

assets.name: Black Ice Shield
assets.passive: Arctic Cold. Taking damage reduces the attacker's Attack Speed to 90% of normal for 1s.

assets.name: Blade Armor
assets.passive: Bladed Armor. When struck by a Basic Attack, deals Physical Damage equal to 30% of the incoming damage (calculated before Damage Reduction) plus 20% of the hero's Physical Defense to the attacker and slows them by 15% for 1s.

assets.name: Blade of Despair
assets.passive: Despair. Dealing damage to non-Minion enemies below 50% HP grants 25% extra Physical Attack for 2s, taking effect before the damage is dealt.

assets.name: Blade of the Heptaseas
assets.passive: Ambush. If no damage is taken or dealt within 5s, the next Basic Attack deals extra Physical Damage equal to 160 plus 40% Physical Attack and slows the target by 40% for 1.5s.

assets.name: Blood Wings
assets.passive: Guard. Gain an 800 (+100% Total Magic Power) Shield that regenerates 20s after being damaged. The shield grants 30 Movement Speed while active and 150 Movement Speed for 1s after it breaks.

assets.name: Bloody Retribution
assets.passive: Bloody Retribution. Retribution damage against creeps and minions is increased to 150%. When cast on an enemy hero, deals 100 True Damage and steals HP equal to 250 plus 20% of the caster's extra HP for 4s. Upgrades after the total number of creep kills, hero kills, and assists reaches 5.

assets.name: Broken Heart
assets.passive: Heart Broken. After purchasing, Cecilion will not be able to use Moonlit Waltz on you during this game.

assets.name: Brute Force Breastplate
assets.passive: Brute Force. Each second after dealing damage, gain 6 Adaptive Attack and 2% extra Movement Speed for 4s, up to 6 stacks. Gain 15% extra Control Duration Reduction at full stacks.

assets.name: Chastise Pauldron
assets.passive: Chastise. Taking damage reduces the attacker's Attack Speed and Attack Speed cap to 75% of normal for 2s.

assets.name: Clock of Destiny
assets.passive: Destiny. Gains 4.5 (+0.5 × Hero Level) Hybrid Defense for 5s when dealing Magic Damage to enemy heroes, stacking up to 6 times. Can gain 1 stack every 0.4s.

assets.name: Conceal
assets.passive: Conceal. Conceals nearby allied heroes, including self, and grants 24%–60% extra Movement Speed for 5s or until they deal or take damage. Requires Roaming Blessing progress to unlock.

assets.name: Concentrated Energy
assets.passive: Recharge. Increases Magic Power by 5 after dealing Magic Damage, stacking up to 6 times and gaining at most 1 stack every 0.4s. At full stacks, increases Magic Damage by 12% for 3s.

assets.name: Corrosion Scythe
assets.passive: Corrosion. Basic Attacks gain 80 extra Physical Damage and slow the target by 8% for 1.5s. The effect is halved for ranged Basic Attacks and stacks up to 5 times.

assets.name: Cursed Helmet
assets.passive: Burning Soul. Deals Magic Damage equal to 1.2% of the hero's Max HP per second to nearby enemies. Damage is increased against creeps and minions and scales with level.

assets.name: Demon Boots
assets.passive: Mysticism. Getting a kill or assist on an enemy Minion restores 4% Mana.

assets.name: Demon Hunter Sword
assets.passive: Devour. Basic Attacks deal 8% of the target's current HP as extra Physical Damage, capped at 60 against minions.

assets.name: Dire Hit
assets.passive: Devotion. In the first 8 minutes, forfeit EXP and Gold rewards gained from minions and creeps to prevent reducing nearby allies' rewards.

assets.name: Divine Glaive
assets.passive: Spellbreaker. When attacking an enemy, gains 0.1% extra Magic Penetration for each point of the enemy's Magic Defense, capped at 20%.

assets.name: Dominance Ice
assets.passive: Arctic Cold. Taking damage reduces the attacker's Attack Speed to 80% of normal for 1s.

assets.name: Dreadnaught Armor
assets.passive: Deter. When attacked by an enemy hero's skill, reduces their Physical Attack by 4% for 2s, stacking up to 3 times.

assets.name: Elegant Gem
assets.passive: Gift. When HP drops below 50%, recovers 15% HP over 3s. When Mana drops below 50%, restores 15% Mana over 3s. Cooldown: 60s.

assets.name: Enchanted Talisman
assets.passive: Mana Spring. Regenerates 15% of Max Mana every 10s.

assets.name: Encourage
assets.passive: Devotion. In the first 8 minutes, forfeit EXP and Gold rewards gained from minions and creeps to prevent reducing nearby allies' rewards.

assets.name: Endless Battle
assets.passive: Divine Justice. After casting a skill, the next Basic Attack within 3s deals 60% Physical Attack as extra True Damage. Cooldown: 1.5s.

assets.name: Favor
assets.passive: Devotion. In the first 8 minutes, forfeit EXP and Gold rewards gained from minions and creeps to prevent reducing nearby allies' rewards.

assets.name: Feather of Heaven
assets.passive: Affliction. Basic Attacks deal an extra 50 (+30% Magic Power) Magic Damage.

assets.name: Flame Retribution
assets.passive: Flame Retribution. Retribution damage against creeps and minions is increased to 150%. When cast on an enemy hero, deals 100 True Damage and steals 58–100 Physical Attack and Magic Power, scaling with level, for 4s. Upgrades after the total number of creep kills, hero kills, and assists reaches 5.

assets.name: Flask of the Oasis
assets.passive: Blessing. When casting a healing or shielding skill, if the target's HP is below 35% or falls below 35% within 3s, grants a level-scaling shield for 3s and reduces the caster's skill cooldowns by 2s. This effect has a per-target cooldown.

assets.name: Fleeting Time
assets.passive: Timestream. Hero kills or assists reduce the Ultimate's current cooldown by 30%.

assets.name: Flower of Hope
assets.passive: Flower of Hope. Every 6s, a skill or Basic Attack deals 60 (+30% Total Physical Attack) (+30% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage.

assets.name: Genius Wand
assets.passive: Magic. Dealing damage to enemy heroes reduces their Magic Defense by 3 + (0.3 × Hero Level) for 2s, stacking up to 3 times.

assets.name: Glowing Wand
assets.passive: Scorch. Burns the target for 3s, dealing Magic Damage equal to 1.5% of the target's Max HP per second.

assets.name: Golden Staff
assets.passive: Swift. Every 1% Critical Chance gained increases Attack Speed by 1%.

assets.name: Great Dragon Spear
assets.passive: Supreme Warrior. After casting an Ultimate, increases Movement Speed by 30% for 7.5s. Cooldown: 15s.

assets.name: Guardian Helmet
assets.passive: Recovery. Regenerates 2.5% Max HP per second, reduced to 0.5% per second for 5s after taking damage.

assets.name: Haas's Claws
assets.passive: Frenzy. Critical strikes grant 20% extra Attack Speed for 2s.

assets.name: Holy Crystal
assets.passive: Mystery. Gains 21%–35% extra Magic Power, scaling with level.

assets.name: Hunter Strike
assets.passive: Retribution. Dealing damage to an enemy hero or creep 5 times in a row grants 50% extra Movement Speed that rapidly decays over 3s. Cooldown: 8s.

assets.name: Ice Queen Wand
assets.passive: Ice Bound. Skill damage slows an enemy hero by 10% for 2s, stacking up to 3 times. Cooldown: 1s.

assets.name: Ice Retribution
assets.passive: Ice Retribution. Retribution damage against creeps and minions is increased to 150%. When cast on an enemy hero, deals 100 True Damage and steals 72–100 Movement Speed, scaling with level, for 4s. Upgrades after the total number of creep kills, hero kills, and assists reaches 5.

assets.name: Immortality
assets.passive: Immortal. Revives 2.5s after death with 16% Max HP and a 220–1200 shield, scaling with level, for 3s. Cooldown: 210s.

assets.name: Lantern of Hope
assets.passive: Lantern of Hope. The equipment's attributes scale with hero level.

assets.name: Lightning Truncheon
assets.passive: Resonate. Every 6s, the next damaging skill resonates, dealing 120% Magic Power as extra Magic Damage to up to 3 enemies and granting 30% Movement Speed that decays over 2s.

assets.name: Magic Blade
assets.passive: Lifeline. When damage reduces HP below 30%, gains a level-scaling shield and 50% Movement Speed that rapidly decays over 3s. Cooldown: 60s.

assets.name: Magic Potion
assets.passive: Increase Power. Automatically used after purchasing, increasing Magic Power by 30 and Cooldown Reduction by 10% for 120s.

assets.name: Malefic Gun
assets.passive: Armor Buster. Increases Physical Penetration by 30%.

assets.name: Malefic Roar
assets.passive: Armor Buster. When attacking an enemy, gains 0.1% extra Physical Penetration for each point of the enemy's Physical Defense, capped at 30%.

assets.name: Molten Essence
assets.passive: Burning Soul. Deals Magic Damage equal to 0.6% of the hero's Max HP per second to nearby enemies. Damage is increased against creeps and minions and scales with level.

assets.name: Oracle
assets.passive: Bless. Received Shield and HP Regen effects are increased by 30%.

assets.name: Power Potion
assets.passive: Increase Power. Upon purchase, grants 30 Physical Attack and 15% Lifesteal for 120s.

assets.name: Queen's Wings
assets.passive: Demonize. When HP drops below 40%, gains 30% Damage Reduction for 3s and reduces skill cooldowns by 2s. Cooldown: 60s.

assets.name: Radiant Armor
assets.passive: Holy Blessing. Taking Magic Damage grants 6–20 Magic Defense, scaling with level, for 5s, up to 6 stacks. Can gain 1 stack every 0.6s.

assets.name: Rapid Boots
assets.passive: Side Effect. Loses 25 Movement Speed for 5s after dealing or taking damage.

assets.name: Rock Potion
assets.passive: Increase Power. Upon purchase, grants 500 extra Max HP and 25% Resilience for 120s.

assets.name: Rose Gold Meteor
assets.passive: Dragon Scale. Every 4 extra Physical Attack increases Hybrid Defense by 1, up to 50. The effect is halved when the hero's main role is not Fighter.

assets.name: Sea Halberd
assets.passive: Lifebane. Dealing damage to a target reduces their Shield and HP Regen effects to 60% of normal for 3s.

assets.name: Sky Piercer
assets.passive: Lethality. After dealing damage to an enemy hero, executes them if their HP is below 4%. Gains 10 Lifebane stacks per kill and loses 30% of current stacks per death. Each stack raises the execute threshold by 0.1%, up to 80 stacks.

assets.name: Starlium Scythe
assets.passive: Crisis. Within 3s after using a skill, the next Basic Attack deals an additional 100 (+100% Total Magic Power) True Damage. Cooldown: 1.5s. Then briefly gains 10% Movement Speed.

assets.name: Swift Crossbow
assets.passive: Crossbow. Each Basic Attack deals 40 extra Adaptive Damage.

assets.name: Throw Forbidden
assets.passive: Heavy Mountain. Become immune to allied Jawhead's Ejector in this match.

assets.name: Thunder Belt
assets.passive: Thunderbolt. Every 4s, the next Basic Attack deals 50 (+100% Total Physical Defense) (+100% Total Magic Defense) extra True Damage around the target and briefly slows by 99%. Hybrid Defense permanently increases by 1 whenever it hits an enemy hero. The effect is reduced for Marksmen and Mages.

assets.name: Tough Boots
assets.passive: Fortitude. Reduces Crowd Control and Slow duration by 30%.

assets.name: War Axe
assets.passive: Fighting Spirit. Attacks grant 12 extra Physical Attack per second for 4s, stacking up to 6 times. At full stacks, deals 10% extra True Damage based on damage dealt. Marksmen, Mages, and Supports receive 50% of the stacked effects.

assets.name: Warrior Boots
assets.passive: Valor. Gain 4 extra Physical Defense for 3s when taking Physical Damage, stacking up to 20.

assets.name: Wind of Nature
assets.passive: Wind Chant. Become immune to all Physical Damage for 2s. Duration is halved for non-Marksmen.

assets.name: Windtalker
assets.passive: Typhoon. Every 5–2s, reduced by 0.2s for each Basic Attack, the next Basic Attack hits up to 3 enemy units for 150–362 Magic Damage. It can critically strike and deals 200% damage to Minions.

assets.name: Winter Crown
assets.passive: Frozen. Become frozen, untargetable, and immune to damage for 2s. Cannot move or cast skills while frozen, but already-cast skills are not interrupted. Cooldown: 100s.

assets.name: Wishing Lantern
assets.passive: Butterfly Goddess. For every 800 Magic Damage dealt to an enemy hero before damage reduction, summons a Butterfly Goddess that deals Magic Damage equal to 10% of the target's current HP.
